# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-a
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-b
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  destination:
    name: service-a
    port: 8080

---

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  destination:
    name: service-b
    port: 8080

---

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-service-a-to-service-b
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            name: service-a
      to:
        - destination:
            name: service-b

---

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-service-b-to-service-a
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            name: service-b
      to:
        - destination:
            name: service-a
